No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a required component of tertiary (Master's) education (Target 4.3) and explicitly aims to develop 'excellent professional research skills' (具備卓越之專業研究能力) relevant for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 具備卓越之專業研究能力

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course's focus on developing 'excellent professional research ability' (具備卓越之專業研究能力) can contribute to achieving productive employment and decent work (Target 8.5).
evidence: 具備卓越之專業研究能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course teaches research methodology and problem-solving skills (培養尋找問題與解決問題之能力), which are fundamental to enhancing scientific research and innovation (Target 9.5).
evidence: 培養尋找問題與解決問題之能力

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to marine life.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' (維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍) aligns with promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3) and developing accountable institutions (Target 16.6) within academia.
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍
